headline: The Bull Case For UnitedHealth Group (UNH) Could Change Following Optum Rx’s New Transparent PBM Model
summary: Earlier this week, UnitedHealth Group’s Optum Rx unit launched a transparent, fee-based pharmacy care model that removes spread pricing and ties fees to per‑member payments, aiming to align incentives for patients and plan sponsors. This shift toward clearer pharmacy pricing has attracted supportive analyst commentary, highlighting how reforming the PBM model could influence UnitedHealth’s broader healthcare earnings mix. Now we’ll examine how Optum Rx’s transparent pharmacy model may...

headline: Bernstein Maintains Outperform Rating on UnitedHealth (UNH) Following PBM Transparency Push
summary: UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE:UNH) ranks among the best stocks for a couch potato portfolio. On May 15, Bernstein SocGen Group maintained its Outperform rating and $444 price target for UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE:UNH). The firm touched on UnitedHealth’s recently introduced transparent pharmacy benefit manager (PBM) approach, which aims to improve clarity, reliability, and cost in […]

headline: Micron Crosses the Trillion-Dollar Line as Chips Dominate Another Session
summary: A single analyst report was all it took. On Tuesday, UBS put a $1,625 price target on Micron Technology - nearly double its opening price - and the market ran with it.

headline: Bernstein Maintains Outperform on UnitedHealth Group, Raises Price Target to $492
summary: Bernstein  analyst Lance Wilkes   maintains UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $444 to $492.
